creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
Hi,

I couldn't find any information if svn is obsolete but Typo3 is still on 10.4.10 at svn.freebsd.org:

https://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head/www/typo3-10/Makefile

It seems up-to-date on git though:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/www/typo3-10/Makefile
